data.title: Microservices
data.description: Amazon utilizes a microservices architecture to enable scalability and flexibility in its operations.

data.title: Fault-Tolerant Systems
data.description: The architecture is designed to withstand faults without major disruption to service.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Distributes incoming network traffic across multiple servers to ensure no single server becomes overwhelmed.

data.title: Data Sharding
data.description: Horizontal partitioning of databases to enhance performance and scalability.
data.technical_spec: Sharding of customer and order databases.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Uses CDN to deliver content faster to users globally.
